title: FX Drafts
body_text:
FX Drafts
1	Introduction
1.1	Overview of FX Drafts
The FX Drafts application allows authorized users to create and print drafts in-branch. Drafts are available in more than 20 foreign currencies, including US dollars. These drafts are negotiable instruments drawn on Convera accounts with its international partner banks.
Contact Convera for information on using the FX Drafts application, ordering draft stock, processing exception items (e.g., voids, refunds), and for inquiries on specific drafts. Contact Central 1 for information on FX Drafts enrollment, User Management on the Client Centre, and settlement.
Related Payment Solutions Manual Parts
Current Account Services (CAS) Online Part

User Management Part

Note:	The Operations Manual Program is available on a subscription basis. For more information about the Program, please contact Product Compliance & Design at
manuals@central1.com
or speak with your Central 1 Account Executive.
